channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Silent Hill: Townfall looks to be a PS5 console launch exclusive, according to official website - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Silent Hill: Townfall looks to be a PS5 console launch exclusive, according to official website  Eurogamer
  2. Silent Hill: Townfall reveals first-person gameplay in a new trailer  PlayStation.Blog
  3. A first-person walk around a foggy Scottish town in the 90s: Silent Hill: Townfall is certainly serious about instilling dread  Rock Paper Shotgun
  4. Silent Hill: Townfall Is Now Available to Pre-Order  Restart.run
  5. Another Upcoming Konami Game Is PS5 Exclusive, Fans Upset  PlayStation LifeStyle

item.title: Nothing Phone 4a leak reveals how much more expensive the new phones will be - Android Authority
item.description:
1. Nothing Phone 4a leak reveals how much more expensive the new phones will be  Android Authority
  2. Nothing Phone (4a) series costs over €400 as prices, specs, release date leak  9to5Google
  3. Nothing to launch its Nothing Phone 4a smartphone in March  Mashable
  4. I hope Nothing's new product tease isn't what it looks like  Creative Bloq
  5. Nothing is looking for fans to test its next phone, the Nothing Phone (4a) series  PhoneArena

item.title: How a PlayStation 6 Delay Could Impact Gran Turismo 8 - GTPlanet
item.description:
1. How a PlayStation 6 Delay Could Impact Gran Turismo 8  GTPlanet
  2. What we know about PS6 (and what we don’t know)  Polygon
  3. Nintendo Is Considering A Switch 2 Price Hike This Year, According To New Report  Nintendo Life
  4. Switch 2 price, PS6 release could be impacted by memory shortage  Mashable
  5. PS6 Plans Reportedly Thrown Into Uncertainty By AI Hardware Demand  GameSpot

item.title: WordPress.com adds an AI Assistant that can edit, adjust styles, create images, and more - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. WordPress.com adds an AI Assistant that can edit, adjust styles, create images, and more  TechCrunch
  2. WordPress AI Assistant Puts Prompt Editing on the Menu for 40% of the Web  eWeek
  3. WordPress’ new AI assistant will let users edit their sites with prompts  The Verge
  4. WordPress AI Assistant Just Gave Every Publisher a Tireless Co-Editor  TechEBlog -
  5. WordPress.com integrates AI assistant into its editing workflow  Digital Watch Observatory

item.title: Don't be surprised if One UI 9 feels smoother to use - SamMobile
item.description:
1. Don't be surprised if One UI 9 feels smoother to use  SamMobile
  2. Android 17 Beta 1 arrives for Pixel: How to download it  Mashable
  3. Google announces Android 17 Beta 1, officially signaling the death of Developer Previews [UPDATE]  Android Police
  4. Google sets accelerated Android 17 release schedule  9to5Google
  5. Google Just Dropped An Update For Pixel Phones — And It’s A Surprise  Forbes

item.title: UK's Advertising Standards Authority bans Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 commercial for "trivializing sexual violence" - GamesIndustry.biz
item.description:
1. UK's Advertising Standards Authority bans Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 commercial for "trivializing sexual violence"  GamesIndustry.biz
  2. Call of Duty Black Ops 7 ad banned for trivialising sexual violence  BBC
  3. Call of Duty ad banned in the UK for trivializing sexual violence  Game Developer
  4. Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Commercial Featuring Nikki Glazer Receives UK Ban for Trivializing Sexual Violence  IGN
  5. Video game advert banned for glorifying sexual violence  The Independent

item.title: Wedbush’s Dan Ives Sticks to Apple Stock Street-High $350 PT – Calls Selloff ‘Unwarranted’ - TipRanks
item.description:
1. Wedbush’s Dan Ives Sticks to Apple Stock Street-High $350 PT – Calls Selloff ‘Unwarranted’  TipRanks
  2. Apple’s Siri saga is at the point of no return  Macworld
  3. Apple's AI 'soap opera' is finally ending, analyst says  qz.com
  4. Down 6%, Should You Buy the Dip on Apple?  The Motley Fool
  5. Why Apple’s (AAPL) AI Rollout Timeline Is Raising Fresh Questions  Yahoo Finance

item.title: Marathon isn't just favouring PlayStation players with exclusive cosmetics; Xbox and Steam players promised bonus loot, too - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Marathon isn't just favouring PlayStation players with exclusive cosmetics; Xbox and Steam players promised bonus loot, too  Eurogamer
  2. Marathon’s Server Slam Begins February 26  Bungie.net
  3. Marathon Open Beta Has Special Rewards For Xbox And PC Users, Too  GameSpot
  4. Bungie Shows Off More Marathon Gameplay in New Impressive Trailer Ahead of Open Preview Server Test Weekend  Wccftech
  5. Does Marathon Have Crossplay? Cross-Platform Status, Explained  Insider Gaming

item.title: ASUS confirms Germany store suspension amid Nokia HEVC patent dispute, support remains unchanged - VideoCardz.com
item.description:
1. ASUS confirms Germany store suspension amid Nokia HEVC patent dispute, support remains unchanged  VideoCardz.com
  2. Acer and Asus halt PC and laptop sales in Germany amid H.264 codec patent dispute — Nokia wins patent ruling, forcing tech giants to license HEVC codec  Tom's Hardware
  3. Public statement to patent dispute with Nokia  ASUS Pressroom
  4. Acer and ASUS are now banned from selling PCs and laptops in Germany following Nokia HEVC video codec patent ruling  VideoCardz.com
  5. German Court Imposes Sales Ban??  indiaherald.com

item.title: Dead or Alive 6: Last Round will not include Mai Shiranui and Kula Diamond nor crossplay or upgrades for existing owners - EventHubs
item.description:
1. Dead or Alive 6: Last Round will not include Mai Shiranui and Kula Diamond nor crossplay or upgrades for existing owners  EventHubs
  2. Dead or Alive 6 Last Round launches on PS5 June 25, new game also in development  PlayStation.Blog
  3. A new Dead or Alive game is now in development  gamingnexus.com
  4. KOEI TECMO and Team NINJA Announce DEAD OR ALIVE 6 Last Round, Available June 25, 2026!  Games Press
  5. Dead or Alive made the most improbable comeback  Esports Insider
